block_04: By applying a multiplier you get to invest up to x100 more than you have on hand.
block_06: Even a tiny 1% price change will result in a 100-fold increase of your potential profit.*
block_11: Your Bitcoin position will be good for 24 hours - just enough to get the most out of the latest trend.
block_13: *Please Note: Applying an investment multiplier increases the amount lost in case of an incorrect prediction. Your losses, however, will never go beyond the amount invested.
